title: geography — retention windows
description: Reference-catalog rows never age out. Geolocation cache respects vendor TTL. No user-scoped data outside the geolocation cache.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5(1)(c) (storage limitation — geolocation results are ephemerally cached)
gdpr Art. 4(1) (definition of personal data — IP addresses are PII)

retention.entity: Country / State / City / Currency / Language / Timezone (vendor tables)

hot.description: permanent — reference data. Rows may be updated by vendor seeder + platform-admin overrides. Deletions only via `world:install --force` or platform-admin action.
vendor TTL (default 3600s). Keys expire naturally; no scan job. IP is the cache key but is never persisted to durable storage.
